title: Sebastian Thrun – Personal - Stanford University
text:
Sebastian Thrun – Personal

!

Sebastian Thrun
===============

#### Adjunct Professor — Stanford University

Home

Research

Students

Papers

FAQ

Contact

Personal

About Sebastian
---------------

!
  
  
Professor Dr.-mult. Sebastian Thrun pursues research on robotics,
artificial intelligence, education, human computer interaction, and
medical devices. He founded Google's self driving car team, after
winning the DARPA Grand Challenge. Together with Peter Norvig, Thrun
developed the first global MOOC with 160,000 students enrolled.
Google Scholar ranks Thrun's publication h-index #14 worldwide in all
of computer science. Thrun also founded Google X, where he founded
Google Glass among many other projects. He was elected into the
National Academy of Engineering and the German Academy of Sciences at
age 39. Thrun founded and sold a number of tech companies, inluding
Udacity (valued at over $1B) and KittyHawk. Fast Company named Thrun
the fifth most creative person in business, and Foreign Policy touted
him Global Thinker #4. He won numerous awards, including the Max
Planck Research Award.
  
  
A [detailed Curriculum Vitae](http://robots.stanford.edu/cv.pdf) is also available.
  
  

### Selected awards and honors

* Listed in [TIME Best Inventions Hall of Fame](https://time.com/7323640/25-iconic-inventions/) for StreetView in 2007, 2025
* Honorary Doctorate, Georgia Institute of Technology, 2024
* Inaugural Lamarr Award, University of Dortmund, Germany, 2024
* Vordenker Preis, Plansecur. Vordenker Forum, Germany, 2022
* Gauß-Medaille, Braunschweigische Wissenschaftliche Gesellschaft, Germany
* [Aachener Ingenieurpreis](https://www.rwth-aachen.de/cms/root/Die-RWTH/Aktuell/Pressemitteilungen/Juli/~indct/Technologie-Pionier-Sebastian-Thrun-wird/#:~:text=Technologie%2DPionier%20Sebastian%20Thrun%20wird%20mit%20dem%20Aachener%20Ingenieurpreis%20ausgezeichnet,-03.07.2020&text=Professor%20Sebastian%20Thrun%20ist%20ausgewiesener,einflussreichsten%20Denker%20der%20Welt%20eingereiht.), 2020
* [Honorary Doctorate, University of Hildesheim, Germany](https://www.ndr.de/nachrichten/niedersachsen/hannover_weser-leinegebiet/Hildesheimer-Ehrendoktor-fuer-Sebastian-Thrun,sebastianthrun100.html), 2020
* [IEEE ICRA Milestone Award](https://ic.gatech.edu/news/636082/dellaert-awarded-ieee-icra-milestone-award), 2020
* [ of all Data Scientists in the world](https://www.analyticsinsight.net/top-15-data-science-experts-of-the-world-in-2020), Analytics Insights, 2020
* [Gartner’s Top 25 Enterprise Software Startups To Watch In 2020](https://www.forbes.com/sites/louiscolumbus/2020/07/05/gartners-top-25-enterprise-software-startups-to-watch-in-2020/) for Cresta, 2020
* [AI 50: America’s Most Promising Artificial Intelligence Companies](https://www.forbes.com/sites/alanohnsman/2020/07/03/ai-50-americas-most-promising-artificial-intelligence-companies/) for Cresta by Forbes, 2020
* [Wired 25](https://www.wired.com/story/wired-25th-anniversary-issue/) (Wired: We picked 25 icons we think are most responsible for the changes of the past quarter-century), 2018
* [CNBC 2018 Disrupter #8](https://www.cnbc.com/2018/05/22/udacity-2018-disruptor-50.html)
* [Global Leadership Award 2018](http://www.worldaffairs.org/events/awards-dinner), World Affair Council
* [CNBC 2017 Disrupter #10](http://www.cnbc.com/2017/05/16/the-2017-cnbc-disruptor-50-list-of-companies.html)
* 2017 ICAPS Influential Paper award
* [Fat Company 3'rd most innovative education company (for GaTech)](https://www.fastcompany.com/most-innovative-companies/2017/sectors/education)
* UPCEA National Award, outstanding program, credit category, 2017
* AAAI Classic Paper Award, Association for the Advancement
  of Artificial Intelligence (AAAI), 2017
* AAAI/EAAI Outstanding Educator Award, Association for the Advancement
  of Artificial Intelligence (AAAI), 2017
* UPCEA South Region Conference “Program of Excellence” Award,
  with Georgia Tech and AT&T, for Online Master of Computer Science, 2016
* The Hottest Startups of 2015, #37, Forbes, 2016
* Global Impact Award, World Affairs Council, 2015
* James Smithson Bicentennial Medal from the Smithsonian Institute, 2015
* TiE50 Top Startup Award, 2015
* #17 Influential Educator, by Noodle, 2014
* The Guardian’s Open 20: fighters for internet freedom, 2014
* GABA Award of Excellence, 2014
* [ALVA Award](http://99u.com/articles/15754/google-xs-sebastian-thrun-on-how-to-invent-amazing-products-change-the-world) by 99U, 2013
[ most creative tech personality](https://www.siliconindia.com/news/technology/15-Most-Creative-Tech-Personalities-nid-143496-cid-2.html) by SiliconIndia News, 2013* [The Guardian's Open 20: fighters for internet freedom](http://www.theguardian.com/technology/2012/apr/20/twenty-fighters-open-internet), 2012
* [Global Thinker #4](http://www.foreignpolicy.com/articles/2012/11/26/the_fp_100_global_thinkers?page=0,3) by Foreign Policy, 2012
* [Smithsonian Ingenuity Award](http://www.smithsonianmag.com/science-nature/Smithsonian-American-Ingenuity-Awards.html), 2012
* [The Next Establishment](http://www.vanityfair.com/business/new-establishment/2012/the-next-establishment) by Vanity Fair, 2012
* [Initiative of 2012](http://www.chip-media.de/events/chip-awards/chip-awards.html) Award, by Chip
* [Top 100 Scientists on Twitter](http://www.accreditedonlinecolleges.com/blog/2012/top-100-scientists-on-twitter/), 2012
* Huffington Post [Best of TED 2011](http://www.huffingtonpost.com/news/tedtalks2011) ()
* Fast Company [Fifth most creative person in business](http://www.fastcompany.com/most-creative-people/2011/sebastian-thrun-google), 2011
* Inaugural [AAAI Ed Feigenbaum Prize](http://www.aaai.org/Awards/feigenbaum.php), 2011.
* [Max Planck Research Award](http://www.mpg.de/mpResearchAward), 2011.
* Crunchie (Annual awards by TechCrunch), Best Technology Achievement, 2011.
* Time Magazine, [The 50 Best Inventions of 2010](http://www.time.com/time/specials/packages/completelist/0,29569,2029497,00.html)
* IEEE ITSS Distinguished Researcher Award, 2010.
* [Smartest People in Tech](http://money.cnn.com/galleries/2010/technology/1007/gallery.smartest_people_tech.fortune/29.html), Academic Runner-Up, Fortune, 2010.
* Braunschweig Research Prize, 2007.
* Member, Deutsche Akademie der Naturforscher Leopoldina (German Academy of Sciences).
* Member, National Academy of Engineering, 2007.
* Scientific American 50 (list of 50 technology and policy leaders), 2006.
* World Technology Award (Category: IT Software), also World Technology Network Fellow; 2006.
* Elected ECCAI Fellow, 2006.
* Elected AAAI Fellow, 2006.
* Forbes Magazine "E-Gang" (list of 7 technology leaders), 2006.
* Vance D. and Arlene C. Coffman Endowed Faculty Scholar, 2006.
* Team Leader of the team that won the DARPA Grand Challenge.
* "Brilliant Ten" by Popular Science, 2005.
* Best paper award, International Conference of Field and Service Robotics (FSR), 2003.
* Best paper award, IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2003.
* Best paper award, Second International Joint Confernce on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS), 2003.
* Finmeccanica Endowed Chair, School of Computer Science, CMU, 2002.
* Olympus Award of the German Society for Pattern Recognition (DAGM), 2001.
* DARPA Distinguished Contractor Award, 2001.
* Best paper award, IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2000.
* Best paper award, German Conference of the Deutsche Arbeitsgemeinschaft fuer Mustererkennung (German Society for Pattern Recognition), 1999.
* NSF CAREER Award, March 1999--February 2003.
* Best paper award, National Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI), 1998.

Check out Sebastian's [Scientific Genealogy](http://robots.stanford.edu/genealogy), from the  [Mathematics Genealogy Project](http://genealogy.math.ndsu.nodak.edu/).
